title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Reliance Industries

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Reliance Industries
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
